title: Ultra-Premium Luxury Fashion Advertisement Collage
sourceTitle: Luxury Fashion Advertisement Collage AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-premium 4:5 luxury fashion advertisement collage for Vellum Atelier, built around a polished magazine campaign layout and readable center typography. Subject: An elegant adult female model appears across multiple high-fashion poses while promoting Vellum Atelier and wearing pearl satin couture tailoring with champagne gold accents with sophisticated styling and premium fashion detail. Scene: Modern editorial campaign environment with soft pastel luxury atmosphere, creamy beige surfaces, champagne accents, blush and pearl tones, and subtle cinematic beauty depth. Composition: Fixed vertical magazine grid: full-body pose, close-up beauty shot, side profile, sitting pose, and walking pose arranged as a refined editorial collage with a central typography block. Signature Elements: Multiple high-fashion poses, modern editorial grid, luxury icons used sparingly, center advertising typography, soft pastel campaign color system, and premium magazine finish. Style: Luxury commercial fashion photography, premium beauty campaign aesthetic, polished magazine advertisement collage, graceful expressions, elegant styling, and high-end retouched finish. Color Palette: Fixed soft pastel luxury palette of creamy beige, champagne gold, blush pink, pearl white, light lavender, and gentle neutral shadows. Lighting: Subtle cinematic beauty lighting with soft skin highlights, graceful fabric sheen, clean shadows, and premium commercial depth. Typography: Vellum Atelier appears as the central brand title; MODERN GRACE appears as the short campaign line; DISCOVER THE COLLECTION appears as the clear call-to-action inside the ad layout. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
